list.title: My bookings
list.subtitle: Track your consultation requests, confirmed sessions, completed bookings, and closed outcomes from the student side.

notes.pending: Your booking request is waiting for the consultant to review it.
notes.accepted: The consultant accepted your request and the session is now confirmed.
notes.completed: The consultation was delivered successfully and the booking is closed.
notes.rejected: The consultant rejected this request and the payment hold should be released.
notes.cancelled: This booking was cancelled before final completion.

empty.title: No bookings in this view
empty.description: No bookings match the selected filter right now. Try another filter or create a new consultation booking.

details.title: Booking details
details.subtitle: Review your consultation request, booking status, payment-hold state, and workflow progress from the student side.

notFound.title: Booking not found
notFound.description: The selected booking could not be found in the current mock store.

summaries.pending: Your booking request was created successfully and is now waiting for the consultant to review it.
summaries.accepted: The consultant accepted your request. Your consultation is now confirmed at the selected date and time.
summaries.completed: The consultation was completed successfully and the booking is now closed from the student side.
summaries.rejected: The consultant rejected this request, so the booking will not proceed.
summaries.cancelled: This booking was cancelled before final completion and remains visible in your booking history.
summaries.default: Your booking is waiting for consultant review.

holdNotes.pending: The payment authorization hold is active, but the amount is not captured until the consultant accepts the session.
holdNotes.accepted: Your payment hold remains valid and will move to capture after the consultation is delivered.
holdNotes.completed: The payment was captured after successful delivery of the consultation session.
holdNotes.rejected: The authorization hold should be reversed and no consultation session is scheduled for this request.
holdNotes.cancelled: No consultation session is active for this request and no payment capture should remain.
holdNotes.default: The system is waiting for the next booking workflow step.

guidance.pending: Pending requests are still under consultant review and may move to confirmed or rejected depending on consultant action.
guidance.confirmed: Confirmed requests mean your slot is reserved and the consultant accepted the session.
guidance.closed: Completed requests are closed successfully. Rejected and cancelled requests remain visible in history for reference.

pending.step1Description: You selected a consultation slot and completed the checkout flow.
pending.step2Description: The system placed a temporary payment hold for the consultation fee.
pending.step3Description: The consultant still needs to accept or reject your request.
pending.step4Description: This step will complete after the consultant accepts your request.

confirmed.step1Description: Your consultation request was submitted successfully.
confirmed.step2Description: The payment hold was authorized for this booking request.
confirmed.step3Description: The consultant reviewed your request and confirmed the session.
confirmed.step4Description: Your consultation is scheduled and ready for delivery.

completed.step1Description: Your consultation request was submitted successfully.
completed.step2Description: The consultation was approved and scheduled.
completed.step4Description: The authorized amount was captured after delivery.

rejected.step1Description: Your consultation request entered the booking workflow.
rejected.step2Description: The temporary hold was created before consultant review.
rejected.step3Description: The request was not approved, so the booking will not proceed.
rejected.step4Description: The payment authorization should be released automatically.

cancelled.step1Description: The consultation request was created successfully.
cancelled.step2Description: The booking was cancelled before final completion.
cancelled.step3Description: No active hold remains for this booking.
cancelled.step4Description: The cancelled request remains visible in booking history.

checkout.title: Booking checkout
checkout.subtitle: Review the selected consultant, session details, and payment summary before confirming your booking.

noSlot.title: No consultation slot selected
noSlot.description: Start from the consultant browsing flow, choose a consultant, and select an available slot before continuing to checkout.

checkout.referencePlaceholder: Will be generated after slot selection

success.title: Payment hold authorized
success.description: The checkout form is valid and the booking request was added to the shared mock store successfully.

sessionSummary.title: Session summary
sessionSummary.description: Confirm the consultant and selected slot before moving to payment.

payment.cardOptionDescription: This page is prepared for Stripe handoff. These inputs simulate the payment capture step until real Stripe Elements are connected.

savePaymentMethod.label: Save payment method for future bookings
savePaymentMethod.description: Placeholder behavior for a future stored-card flow.

holdNotice.title: Authorization hold notice
holdNotice.description: When you continue, the system will place a payment hold for this booking request. The amount is captured only after the consultant accepts the session.
holdNotice.acceptLabel: I understand and accept the payment hold behavior for this booking.

checkout.confirmationNote: By continuing, you confirm the selected consultant, selected slot, payment hold behavior, and booking terms before moving to payment.

errors.expiryFormat: Expiry date must be in MM/YY format.
errors.expiryMonthRange: Expiry month must be between 01 and 12.
errors.holdNoticeRequired: You must confirm the payment hold notice before continuing.
